files.title: here.now Skill
files.summary: Publish static sites instantly via the here.now hosting platform.

files.title: here.now Overview
files.summary: here.now is free, instant web hosting for agents.

files.title: Authentication
files.summary: Two modes of authentication:

files.title: Get Site Details
files.summary: `GET /api/v1/publish/:slug` (alias: `GET /api/v1/artifact/:slug`)

files.title: Refresh Upload URLs
files.summary: `POST /api/v1/publish/:slug/uploads/refresh` (alias: `POST /api/v1/artifact/:slug/uploads/refresh`)

files.title: List Sites
files.summary: `GET /api/v1/publishes` (alias: `GET /api/v1/artifacts`)

files.title: Finalize a Publish
files.summary: `POST /api/v1/publish/:slug/finalize` (alias: `POST /api/v1/artifact/:slug/finalize`)

files.title: Update an Existing Site
files.summary: `PUT /api/v1/publish/:slug` (alias: `PUT /api/v1/artifact/:slug`)

files.title: Create a Site
files.summary: `POST /api/v1/publish` (alias: `POST /api/v1/artifact`)

files.title: Upload Files
files.summary: For each entry in `upload.uploads[]`, PUT the file to the presigned URL:

files.title: Delete a Site
files.summary: `DELETE /api/v1/publish/:slug` (alias: `DELETE /api/v1/artifact/:slug`)

files.title: Forkable Sites
files.summary: Allow others to download and remix your site.

files.title: Claim an Anonymous Site
files.summary: `POST /api/v1/publish/:slug/claim` (alias: `POST /api/v1/artifact/:slug/claim`)

files.title: SPA Routing
files.summary: For single-page applications (React, Vue, Svelte), enable SPA mode so unknown paths serve `index.html` instead of 404.

files.title: Password Protection
files.summary: Add a password to any site so visitors must authenticate before viewing. Server-side enforcement — content is never sent to the browser until the password is verified.

files.title: Patch Metadata
files.summary: `PATCH /api/v1/publish/:slug/metadata` (alias: `PATCH /api/v1/artifact/:slug/metadata`)

files.title: Payment Gating
files.summary: Require visitors to pay with stablecoins on the Tempo network before accessing your site.

files.title: Duplicate a Site
files.summary: `POST /api/v1/publish/:slug/duplicate`

files.title: Links
files.summary: Links connect a site to a location on your handle or custom domain.

files.title: Handle Management
files.summary: A handle gives you a stable subdomain like `yourname.here.now`.

files.title: Custom Domains
files.summary: Bring your own domain and serve sites from it.

files.title: Service Variables
files.summary: Store API keys and secrets on your account for use in proxy routes.

files.title: Proxy Routes
files.summary: Sites can make authenticated API calls to external services via a `.herenow/proxy.json` manifest.

files.title: API Endpoint Reference
files.summary: `https://here.now/api/v1`

files.title: Limits
files.summary: | Feature | Anonymous | Authenticated |

files.title: 🧅 Context Layers — Token-Efficient Agent Wake-up
files.summary: The context layer system minimizes token usage on agent startup while providing

files.title: Tolu Identity
files.summary: I am Agent Zero, an autonomous AI assistant serving user Tolu. My memory palace lives at github.com/ToXMon/tolu.
